summary: Developed a basic e-commerce MVP with product listing, user management, and shopping cart functionality.

metadata.handoff: Developer handoff: implemented src/components/ProductList.tsx, src/components/ShoppingCart.tsx, src/App.tsx. Added tests: src/components/ProductList.test.tsx, src/components/ShoppingCart.test.tsx.

code_changes.description: Added component for displaying product list.
Added component for displaying shopping cart.
Updated App component to include ProductList and ShoppingCart components.
code_changes.content: Welcome to E-commerce MVP

tests.description: Test to ensure ProductList component renders products correctly.
Test to ensure ShoppingCart component renders cart items correctly.
